recommendations.title: Hope and Glory
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged man recalls his childhood growing up in and around London during World War II.

recommendations.title: Chocolat
recommendations.overview: On her way to visit her childhood home in a colonial outpost in Northern Cameroon, a young French woman recalls her childhood, her memories concentrating on her family's houseboy.

recommendations.title: A Guide to Recognizing Your Saints
recommendations.overview: Dito Montiel, a successful author, receives a call from his long-suffering mother, asking him to return home and visit his ailing father. Dito recalls his childhood growing up in a violent neighborhood in Queens, N.Y., with friends Antonio, Giuseppe,

recommendations.title: Cinema Paradiso
recommendations.overview: A filmmaker recalls his childhood, when he fell in love with the movies at his village's theater and formed a deep friendship with the theater's projectionist.

recommendations.title: Almost Adults
recommendations.overview: A film about growing apart when growing up. Two best friends relationship strains when one deals with her newfound sexuality and the other with breaking up with her long term boyfriend.

recommendations.title: Silent Light
recommendations.overview: Johan and his family are Mennonites from the north of Mexico. Against the law of God and Man, Johan falls in love with another woman.

recommendations.title: The Road Home
recommendations.overview: Prompted by the death of his father and the grief of his mother, a man recalls the story of how they met in flashback.

recommendations.title: From Beginning to End
recommendations.overview: Two brothers develop a very close relationship as they are growing up in an idyllic and happy family. When they are young adults their relationship becomes very intimate, romantic, and sexual.

recommendations.title: Child's Pose
recommendations.overview: Child's Pose is a contemporary drama focusing on the relationship between a mother and her 32-year-old son. After the accidental killing of a boy in a car crash, the mother tries to prevent her son being charged for the death, and she refuses to acce

recommendations.title: Johnny Got His Gun
recommendations.overview: A young American soldier, rendered in pseudocoma from an artillery shell from WWI, recalls his life leading up to that point.
